description: Compute tree statistics: leaf and total-node counts, tree depth + farthest leaf, branch-length mean/min/max, and internal-node support mean/min/max.
rules: read-only — never modifies the input tree
TREE_FORMAT is the ETE Newick format number (default 0)
usage: Set TREE_FILE (input Newick tree) and TREE_FORMAT (Newick format number, default 0). Output: stats.txt.
limitation: Requires ete3 for the actual statistics; without it the porter records an ete3-missing note and exits 0. Stdout-only op — no tree file is written.
